description:
## Component: hx-button (UPGRADE)
**Tier 1 — Universal Foundation | Industry Consensus: 6/6 libraries**

Upgrade the existing hx-button scaffold to a production-grade action button supporting all standard variants and Drupal Form API integration.

### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic)
Per our architecture decision (see `apps/docs/src/content/docs/guides/drupal-integration-architecture.md`), buttons are atomic components where the component controls rendering. Properties handle variants, sizes, states. The default slot accepts label text (Drupal controls button labels).

### API Design

**Properties:**
- `variant`: primary | secondary | tertiary | danger | ghost | outline
- `hx-size`: sm | md | lg
- `type`: button | submit | reset (for form integration)
- `disabled`: boolean
- `loading`: boolean (shows spinner, disables interaction)
- `href`: string (renders as `<a>` instead of `<button>`)
- `target`: string (when href is set)
- `name` / `value`: for form submission via ElementInternals

**Slots:**
- Default slot: Button label text
- `prefix`: Icon or content before label
- `suffix`: Icon or content after label

**CSS Parts:**
- `button`: The native button/anchor element
- `label`: Label text wrapper
- `prefix` / `suffix`: Icon containers
- `spinner`: Loading spinner

**Events:**
- `hx-click`: Fires on click (composed: true, bubbles through shadow DOM)

### Drupal Integration
```twig
{# Property-driven — Drupal passes config, component renders #}
<hx-button variant="primary" hx-size="lg" type="submit">
  Save Patient Record
</hx-button>

{# With icon slots #}
<hx-button variant="danger">
  <hx-icon slot="prefix" name="trash"></hx-icon>
  Delete Record
</hx-button>

{# As Form API submit button (ElementInternals) #}
<hx-button type="submit" name="op" value="save">
  Submit Intake Form
</hx-button>
```

### Form API Integration
- Implement `static formAssociated = true` + `ElementInternals`
- `setFormValue()` on click when type="submit" with name/value
- Works inside native `<form>` and `<hx-form>` (Light DOM wrapper)
- See `apps/docs/src/content/docs/drupal-integration/forms/form-api.md`

### Healthcare Use Cases
- Form submission buttons (patient intake, prescription orders)
- Destructive actions with danger variant (record deletion with confirmation)
- Loading state during async operations (submitting orders)

### Acceptance Criteria
1. All 6 variants render correctly with design tokens (--hx-* custom properties)
2. Loading state shows spinner and prevents double-click
3. href mode renders semantic `<a>` tag
4. ElementInternals form participation works in Drupal Form API
5. Keyboard accessible: Enter/Space activate, visible focus ring
6. All CSS uses design tokens, zero hardcoded values
7. CSS Parts exposed for theming through shadow DOM
8. `hx-click` event fires with `composed: true` for Drupal behaviors
9. Storybook stories for all variants, sizes, states
10. WCAG 2.1 AA compliant (contrast, focus, ARIA)
title: T1-01: hx-button — Primary Action Button

Upgrade the existing hx-button scaffold to a production-grade action button supporting all standard variants and Drupal Form API integration.

### ADR-001 Classification: Property-Driven (Atomic)

### API Design

**Properties:**
- `variant`: primary | secondary | tertiary | danger | ghost | outline
- `hx-size`: sm | md | lg
- `type`: button | submit | reset (for form integration)
- `disabled`: boolean
- `loading`: boolean (shows spinner, disables interaction)
- `href`: string (renders as `<a>` instead of `<button>`)
- `target`: string (when href is set)
- `name` / `value`: for form submission via ElementInternals

**Slots:**
- Default slot: Button label text
- `prefix`: Icon or content before label
- `suffix`: Icon or content after label

```twig
  Delete Record

{# As Form API submit button (ElementInternals) #}
<hx-button type="submit" name="op" value="save">
  Submit Intake Form

```

- Implement `static formAssociated = true` + `ElementInternals`

- See `apps/docs/src/content/docs/drupal-integration/forms/form-api.md`

1. All 6 variants render correctly with design tokens (--hx-* custom properties)
2. Loading state shows spinner and prevents double-click
3. href mode renders semantic `<a>` tag
4. ElementInternals form participation works in Drupal Form API
5. Keyboard accessible: Enter/Space activate, visible focus ring
6. All CSS uses design tokens, zero hardcoded values
7. CSS Parts exposed for theming through shadow DOM
8. `hx-click` event fires with `composed: true` for Drupal behaviors
9. Storybook stories for all variants, sizes, states
10. WCAG 2.1 AA compliant (contrast, focus, ARIA)
